sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112323" key="friki/asis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρῑκ-ίᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n112323.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shivering,</tr_> Sch.Poet. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg002.perseus-grc1:166" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">166</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
